expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory
At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: 'Duplicated Code', 'Primitive Obsession', 'Parallel Inheritance', 'Dead Code', 'Refused Bequest', 'Data Class'

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside scope
Report includes an overall smell density rating
expectations.evidence: Summary table only, no aggregate rating

expectations.text: Agent did not modify source files

expectations.evidence: Code snippets, line references, file counts, and concrete examples
